title: EUREKA 3 — Sara hugs Ginger
prompt: Medium close-up in @backyard-kitchen. @Sara kneels on the grass and wraps both arms around @Ginger in a warm hug, faces close, both smiling huge. The petunia flowerbed visible center-back. Sara (giggling): "Silly girl! No more hiding bagels, OK?" Ginger licks happily and pants: "Yip yip!" Soft golden afternoon light.
